task_name: Live-event lifecycle — accumulate + clear on switch/load (consumer)

strengths: Clean predicate extraction — shouldClearOnWorkspaceChange is a pure function with no side effects, easily testable
Proper null handling prevents false-clear on initial workspace set (prevId=null)
BoardContext useRef for prevWorkspaceIdRef avoids stale closure in effect
Existing clear points (createBoard, handleApprove, handleRetryExecution, handleNewBoard) preserved — no regression
